tasks.completion_summary: Created plugin architecture specification (docs/specs/plugin-architecture.md) documenting ShellConfig, IHistoryStore, ICompletionProvider interfaces, DLL discovery, registration order, and example plugins.

Created config file format specification (docs/specs/config-format.md) documenting [history], [completion], [plugins] TOML sections, Tomlyn library choice, default behavior, first-run creation, and C# class representation.

Created shell implementation phases specification (docs/specs/shell-implementation-phases.md) documenting 7 incremental phases (P1-P7) with scope, effort estimates, acceptance criteria, and progressive rollout milestones.
